cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who ends up with which book after all those swaps. There are five friends: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a specific book. The initial setup is: - Alice: Moby Dick - Bob: Ulysses - Claire: The Fellowship of the Ring - Dave: Lolita - Eve: Catch-22 Now, there are a series of swaps mentioned. Let me list them step by step and track the changes. First swap: Claire and Bob swap books. So after this swap: - Claire will have Ulysses (Bob's original book) - Bob will have The Fellowship of the Ring (Claire's original book) So the new holdings are: - Alice: Moby Dick - Bob: The Fellowship of the Ring - Claire: Ulysses - Dave: Lolita - Eve: Catch-22 Second swap: Claire and Dave swap books. Now: - Claire had Ulysses, so she gives it to Dave. - Dave had Lolita, so he gives it to Claire. Now the holdings are: - Alice: Moby Dick - Bob: The Fellowship of the Ring - Claire: Lolita - Dave: Ulysses - Eve: Catch-22 Third swap: Dave and Alice swap books. - Dave had Ulysses, gives to Alice. - Alice had Moby Dick, gives to Dave. So now: - Alice: Ulysses - Bob: The Fellowship of the Ring - Claire: Lolita - Dave: Moby Dick - Eve: Catch-22 Fourth swap: Dave and Bob swap books. - Dave has Moby Dick, gives to Bob. - Bob has The Fellowship of the Ring, gives to Dave. So now: - Alice: Ulysses - Bob: Moby Dick - Claire: Lolita - Dave: The Fellowship of the Ring - Eve: Catch-22 Fifth swap: Eve and Dave swap books. - Eve has Catch-22, gives to Dave. - Dave has The Fellowship of the Ring, gives to Eve. So after the final swap, the holdings are: - Alice: Ulysses - Bob: Moby Dick - Claire: Lolita - Dave: Catch-22 - Eve: The Fellowship of the Ring Now, the question is asking: At the end of the semester, Dave has which book? Looking at the final list, Dave has Catch-22. Therefore, the answer should be (E) Catch-22. Let me double-check my steps to make
